name: flightSummary
_note: Flight-summary aggregation. Returns totalFlights/totalHours/averageDuration/longestFlight/shortestFlight/totalFuelConsumed/avgFuelPerHour. The page's Action Result panel guards on totalHours+averageDuration (a render block was added — previously only the hobbsLog totalTime/picTime block existed, so flightSummary output never displayed). Empty flights returns totalFlights:0 / totalHours:0 with a message. Fixed 2026-06-28.
